body:
## Summary

Fixes #24.

This follow-up fixes the remaining GitHub Pages e2e timeout from run #25923199254 after PR #25. The deployment freshness gate was already working: `wait-for-pages-deployment.sh` confirmed the live site was serving commit `82419bd5d5922169e12bb2c25d20ce2d4bdfef45` before Playwright started. The remaining failure was test navigation: `page.goto('/')` resolved `https://link-assistant.github.io/formal-ai/` to the origin root `https://link-assistant.github.io/`, which returns 404, so every test waited for `.app` until the 15 minute job timeout cancelled the run.

## Changes

- Normalize `PAGES_URL` with a trailing slash in `tests/e2e/playwright.pages.config.js`.
- Change live Pages specs from `page.goto('/')` to `page.goto('./')` so navigation stays under `/formal-ai/`.
- Wait for manual mode, enabled input, and seeded tool data before multilingual prompts that depend on loaded runtime seed files.
- Add `pages_e2e_navigation_preserves_repository_subpath` as the regression test for this URL-resolution failure.
- Extend `docs/case-studies/issue-24/` with run #25923199254 logs, PR #26 metadata, URL-resolution evidence, root-404 evidence, and verification logs.
- Keep `Cargo.lock` aligned with the already-released `Cargo.toml` package version `0.23.0`.

## Reproduction

Before the fix, `cargo test pages_e2e_navigation_preserves_repository_subpath -- --nocapture` fails because Pages e2e has no base-URL normalization and the specs still use `page.goto('/')`. The preserved failing test log is `docs/case-studies/issue-24/raw-data/pages-navigation-regression-before-fix.log`.

The preserved CI log `docs/case-studies/issue-24/raw-data/run-25923199254.log` shows deployment freshness succeeded, Playwright ran with `PAGES_URL="https://link-assistant.github.io/formal-ai/"`, and the first live tests failed after the shared 15 second `.app` readiness wait before the job was cancelled.

## Verification

- `cargo fmt --all -- --check`
- `cargo clippy --all-targets --all-features`
- `cargo test workflow_release -- --nocapture`
- `cargo test --all-features --verbose`
- `cargo test --doc --verbose`
- `rust-script scripts/check-file-size.rs`
- `rust-script scripts/check-version-modification.rs` with PR env vars
- `rust-script scripts/check-changelog-fragment.rs`
- `node --check tests/e2e/playwright.pages.config.js`
- `node --check tests/e2e/tests/demo.spec.js`
- `node --check tests/e2e/tests/multilingual.spec.js`
- `git diff --cached --check`
- `cd tests/e2e && npm ci`
- `cd tests/e2e && npx playwright install chromium`
- `cd tests/e2e && PAGES_URL=https://link-assistant.github.io/formal-ai/ npx playwright test --config=playwright.pages.config.js` — 34 passed in 20.0s

No screenshots are included because this is a CI navigation/readiness failure, not a visual UI change.

commits.messageBody:
Adding .gitkeep for PR creation (default mode).
This file will be removed when the task is complete.

Issue: https://github.com/link-assistant/formal-ai/issues/24

commits.messageHeadline: fix(ci): preserve Pages subpath in e2e tests

title: fix(ci): preserve Pages subpath in live e2e tests
